title: stelis pilosissima
intro: Stelis pilosissima, also known as the hairy Stelis, is a species of orchid native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. It is a type of epiphyte, which means that it grows on other plants, such as trees, without deriving nutrients from them. The medicinal properties of Stelis pilosissima include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. Herbal preparations of Stelis pilosissima include teas and infusions, which are believed to provide health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and promoting wound healing.
